title: scanner persists N witness rows individually per block; O(N) separate DB round-trips per block
description: scanner.rs scan_block: the witness persistence loop calls upsert_witness once per unspent note per block. With M unspent notes, this is M separate DB round-trips per block. Since the DB pool is max_connections=1, each upsert is synchronous. A batch upsert using a single SQL statement with multiple rows (or at minimum pipelining inside the existing transaction) would reduce DB overhead from O(N) to O(1) round-trips per block.
